---
format: 
  html:
    css: styles-index.css
    toc: false
include-in-header:
  file: scripts.js
title: "Home"
pagetitle: "ROeS 2027 · 35th Conference of the Austro-Swiss Region (ROeS) of the IBS"
lightbox: true
---

::: {.column-screen}
```{=html}
<section class="hero" style="background-image:url('img/ST_Bern-Rosengarten_36720_compressed.jpg');">
  <div class="hero__scrim">
    <div class="hero__content">
      <p class="hero__eyebrow">15&ndash;19 August 2027 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Bern, Switzerland</p>
      <h1 class="hero__title">35<sup>th</sup> Conference of the Austro-Swiss Region (ROeS)</h1>
      <p class="hero__subtitle">of the International Biometric Society (IBS)</p>
      <div class="hero__actions">
        <a class="btn-cta" href="key-dates.html">Key Dates</a>
        <a class="btn-cta btn-cta--ghost" href="committees.html">Committees</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <span class="hero__credit">© Bern Welcome</span>
</section>
```
:::

::: {.column-page}
```{=html}
<div class="facts">
  <div class="fact">
    <i class="bi bi-calendar-event"></i>
    <span class="fact__label">When</span>
    <span class="fact__value">15&ndash;19 August 2027</span>
  </div>
  <div class="fact">
    <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i>
    <span class="fact__label">Where</span>
    <span class="fact__value">University of Bern<br>Switzerland</span>
  </div>
  <div class="fact">
    <i class="bi bi-people"></i>
    <span class="fact__label">Host</span>
    <span class="fact__value">Austro-Swiss Region (ROeS)<br>of the IBS</span>
  </div>
</div>
```
:::

::: {.column-page .news-section}

::: {.callout-important}
# Latest News

**The ROeS 2027 website is up and the conference date and location are confirmed:**  
The 35<sup>th</sup> Conference of the [Austro-Swiss Region (ROeS)](https://www.ibs-roes.org) of the [International Biometric Society (IBS)](https://www.biometricsociety.org) will take place from 15<sup>th</sup> to 19<sup>th</sup> August 2027, at the [**University of Bern**](https://www.unibe.ch) in [**Bern**](https://bern.com)**, Switzerland**.

:::

:::

<!-- {{< include _sponsors.qmd >}} -->
